title: rourea revoluta var. revoluta
intro: Rourea revoluta var. revoluta, also known as the African oak, is a plant species that belongs to the family Connaraceae and is native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Rourea revoluta var. revoluta include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and prevent infections. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and poultices, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
